description: Which model gives you the most business value per dollar? Composite score blends Add-to-Cart rate (40%), cost-per-conversation (30%), p95 latency (15%) and Sigil quality (15%) into a single leaderboard. Best model on top.

panels.title: 🏆 Best models — composite ranking (ATC × Cost × Performance × Quality)

panels.description:
One row per model, ranked by a composite score that blends business value and cost. Formula:
  composite = 40·atc_rate + 30/(1+1000·cost_per_conv) + 15/(1+p95_latency) + 15·quality_0_1
Where atc_rate is ATC events ÷ calls (so a model that converts 10% of its calls scores 4 from that term), cost_per_conv is dollars per call (Ollama≈0 → full 30 points, $0.01/call → ~15 points), p95 is seconds (sub-1s → ~15, 10s → ~1.4), and quality is the Sigil business_value_score 0-1. Practical max ≈ 100 for a free, fast, high-converting, high-quality model. Sort by any column.

Post-2026-05-16 retune: Anthropic is Haiku-only; Sonnet/Opus rows in this panel are historical.

targets.expr:
sum by (model) (count_over_time(
  {service_namespace="observibelity",container="tool"} |~ "atc_event"
  | pattern `<_>atc_event source=<source> product_id=<pid> sku=<sku> qty=<qty> agent_name=<agent> model=<model> <_>`
  [24h]
))

panels.title: 🏁 Top Models leaderboard — composite score (24h)
💎 Cost-vs-ATC efficiency — find the winning quadrant

panels.description:
X axis = $ per conversation (lower is better, left side wins). Y axis = ATC rate % (higher is better, top side wins). The upper-left quadrant is the bargain bin: cheap models that still drive cart-adds. Models in the lower-right are paying premium prices for no business outcome.

Post-2026-05-16 retune: Anthropic is Haiku-only; Sonnet/Opus rows in this panel are historical.

  {service_namespace="observibelity",container="tool"} |~ "atc_event"
  | pattern `<_>atc_event source=<source> product_id=<pid> sku=<sku> qty=<qty> agent_name=<agent> model=<model> <_>`
  [24h]
))

panels.title: 💎 ATC rate (%) vs Cost per conversation ($) — per model (24h)
📈 Per-model trends — ATC, cost and latency over time
panels.description: Post-2026-05-16 retune: Anthropic is Haiku-only; Sonnet/Opus rows in this panel are historical.
Add-to-Cart events per second per model over time (5m sliding window). Pick out winners as their lines climb.

targets.expr:
sum by (model) (rate(
  {service_namespace="observibelity",container="tool"} |~ "atc_event"
  | pattern `<_>atc_event source=<source> product_id=<pid> sku=<sku> qty=<qty> agent_name=<agent> model=<model> <_>`
  [5m]
))

panels.title: 🛒 ATC events/sec per model

panels.description:
USD per hour spend per model (5m rate × 3600). The widest band is currently eating your budget.

Post-2026-05-16 retune: Anthropic is Haiku-only; Sonnet/Opus rows in this panel are historical.
panels.title: 💰 Spend rate per model (USD/hour)

panels.description:
p95 latency per model — 95% of requests finish faster than this line. Watch for spikes; users feel tail latency more than averages.

Post-2026-05-16 retune: Anthropic is Haiku-only; Sonnet/Opus rows in this panel are historical.
